title: TestAllocationsPerParse timeout with -race in CI
description: TestAllocationsPerParse/100KB takes ~141s per -count with -race (parses 100KB JSON 100×). With -count=3 the default 300s timeout is exceeded (~470s needed). Options: (1) set -timeout 600s for root package in CI, (2) reduce iterations to 10 for -race runs, (3) skip this benchmark in -race CI. This is an allocation measurement test, not a correctness test.
